# AutoPlanet Corporation — Complete Knowledge Base
# https://autoplanetcorp.com
# Last Updated: 2026-05-05
# Language: English (India)
# Contact: +91-7904914455 | ceo@autoplanetcorp.com

================================================================
SECTION 1: COMPANY OVERVIEW
================================================================

AutoPlanet Corporation is an enterprise AI automation company founded
in 2024 and headquartered in Villupuram, Tamil Nadu, India.

Mission: To make enterprise-grade AI accessible to businesses of
every size, eliminating the gap between what AI can do and what
businesses actually use it for.

Core Belief: Every business process that involves reading, writing,
deciding, or routing can be automated with AI. We build the systems
that make this real.

Founder: Suriya
Service Area: India (primary), Global (remote)
Headquarters: Villupuram, Tamil Nadu, India 605602

================================================================
SECTION 2: SERVICES — DETAILED BREAKDOWN
================================================================

--------------------------------------------------------------
SERVICE 1: Custom LLM Development
--------------------------------------------------------------

What It Is:
We build private, domain-specific Large Language Models trained on
your organization's proprietary data. Unlike generic models (ChatGPT,
Gemini), a custom LLM understands your terminology, processes, and
produces outputs aligned with your business logic.

Technical Process:
1. Data Audit: We analyze your existing data (databases, PDFs,
   wikis, CRM exports, support tickets). 
2. Base Model Selection: We choose the optimal foundation model:
   - Llama 3.x (Meta) — best for general enterprise use
   - Mistral — best for European data compliance
   - Gemma (Google) — best for lightweight deployment
3. Fine-Tuning: Using techniques including:
   - LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation)
   - QLoRA — quantized fine-tuning
   - RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback)
4. RAG Integration: We build a Retrieval-Augmented Generation
   pipeline using vector databases (Pinecone, Qdrant, Chroma) 
5. Evaluation: Benchmarked against real use cases with
   metrics including accuracy, latency, and hallucination rate.
6. Deployment: Deployed to your infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure, or On-prem).

Pricing: Custom quotes. Typical range: ₹3,00,000 — ₹25,00,000

--------------------------------------------------------------
SERVICE 2: AI SaaS Platform Development
--------------------------------------------------------------

What It Is:
End-to-end development of AI-powered software-as-a-service
platforms. We build production-grade SaaS with authentication, 
multi-tenancy, subscription billing, and embedded AI.

Tech Stack:
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Vanilla CSS
- Backend: Next.js API Routes / Node.js / Python FastAPI
- Database: PostgreSQL, Redis
- AI Layer: LangChain, OpenAI API, Custom LLMs
- Infrastructure: Vercel, AWS, Docker

Pricing: Custom quotes. Typical range: ₹5,00,000 — ₹40,00,000.

--------------------------------------------------------------
SERVICE 3: Workflow Automation
--------------------------------------------------------------

What It Is:
AI-driven process automation that identifies repetitive manual
tasks and replaces them with intelligent automated workflows. 
Our clients report an average 83% reduction in manual task volume.

================================================================
SECTION 3: TECHNOLOGY & EXPERTISE
================================================================

AI/ML Expertise:
- Large Language Models (GPT, Llama, Mistral, Gemma)
- Fine-Tuning (LoRA, QLoRA, RLHF, DPO)
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- Vector Databases (Pinecone, Qdrant, Chroma, pgvector)
- Prompt Engineering & Optimization
- AI Agents (LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI)

Software Engineering:
- TypeScript, Python
- Next.js, React, Node.js, FastAPI
- PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch
- Docker, Vercel, AWS

================================================================
SECTION 4: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
================================================================

Q: How much does a custom LLM cost?
A: Projects range from ₹3L to ₹25L depending on model size and complexity.

Q: Can you work with my existing data?
A: Yes. We work with databases, PDFs, CRM exports, and any text-based source.

Q: How long does a project take?
A: Custom LLMs: 30-90 days. SaaS platforms: 60-120 days.
   Workflow automation: 14-60 days.
